list.name: machine_id
list.query: SELECT device_id AS __text FROM public.devices WHERE enabled = true ORDER BY device_id ASC;
list.label: Machine

options.content: APEX COMMANDNOC OVERVIEW  |  ENG DRILL-DOWN  |  CAPACITY FORECAST

panels.description: OS Taskbar navigation and CSS theme.

panels.title: Days Until Full (Resource Battery)

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'Disk' AS metric, LEAST(CASE WHEN r.slope<=0 THEN 365 ELSE GREATEST(0,(t.disk_total_gb - r.intercept)/r.slope - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())/86400) END, 365) AS "Days Until Full" FROM (SELECT device_id, COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)),0) AS slope, COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)),0) AS intercept FROM (SELECT device_id, time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day, AVG(avg_disk_used) AS avg_used FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE bucket > NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1,2) d GROUP BY device_id) r JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, disk_total_gb FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE disk_total_gb>0 ORDER BY device_id, time DESC) t ON t.device_id=r.device_id ORDER BY 1 ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT 'RAM' AS metric, LEAST(CASE WHEN r.slope<=0 THEN 365 ELSE GREATEST(0,(t.ram_total_mb - r.intercept)/r.slope - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())/86400) END, 365) AS "Days Until Full" FROM (SELECT device_id, COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)),0) AS slope, COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)),0) AS intercept FROM (SELECT device_id, time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day, AVG(avg_ram_used) AS avg_used FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE bucket > NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1,2) d GROUP BY device_id) r JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, ram_total_mb FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE ram_total_mb>0 ORDER BY device_id, time DESC) t ON t.device_id=r.device_id ORDER BY 1 ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT 'CPU' AS metric, LEAST(CASE WHEN slope<=0 THEN 365 ELSE GREATEST(0,(100-intercept)/slope-EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())/86400) END, 365) AS "Days Until Full" FROM (SELECT device_id, COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_cpu, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)),0) AS slope, COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_cpu, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)),0) AS intercept FROM (SELECT device_id, time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day, AVG(avg_cpu) AS avg_cpu FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE bucket > NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1,2) d GROUP BY device_id) ORDER BY 2 ASC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Days until resource saturation for CPU, RAM, and Disk using 30-day linear regression.

panels.title: Disk: Days Until Full

targets.rawSql: WITH daily_usage AS (  SELECT device_id, time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day,    AVG(avg_disk_used) AS avg_used  FROM public.sys_hourly  WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'  GROUP BY 1, 2), totals AS (  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, disk_total_gb  FROM public.sys_metrics  WHERE disk_total_gb > 0  ORDER BY device_id, time DESC), regression AS (  SELECT device_id,    COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)), 0) AS slope,    COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)), 0) AS intercept  FROM daily_usage GROUP BY device_id) SELECT r.device_id AS metric,  CASE WHEN r.slope <= 0 THEN 9999    WHEN t.disk_total_gb <= 0 THEN 9999    ELSE GREATEST(0, (t.disk_total_gb - r.intercept) / r.slope - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 86400)  END AS value FROM regression r JOIN totals t ON t.device_id = r.device_id ORDER BY value ASC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Days until disk saturation based on 30-day linear regression. Red < 30d, Orange < 90d, Green > 180d.

panels.title: RAM: Days Until Full

targets.rawSql: WITH daily_usage AS (  SELECT device_id, time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day,    AVG(avg_ram_used) AS avg_used  FROM public.sys_hourly  WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'  GROUP BY 1, 2), totals AS (  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, ram_total_mb  FROM public.sys_metrics  WHERE ram_total_mb > 0  ORDER BY device_id, time DESC), regression AS (  SELECT device_id,    COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)), 0) AS slope,    COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)), 0) AS intercept  FROM daily_usage GROUP BY device_id) SELECT r.device_id AS metric,  CASE WHEN r.slope <= 0 THEN 9999    WHEN t.ram_total_mb <= 0 THEN 9999    ELSE GREATEST(0, (t.ram_total_mb - r.intercept) / r.slope - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 86400)  END AS value FROM regression r JOIN totals t ON t.device_id = r.device_id ORDER BY value ASC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Days until RAM saturation based on 30-day linear regression trend.

panels.title: CPU: Days Until Saturation

targets.rawSql: WITH daily_usage AS (SELECT device_id, time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day, AVG(avg_cpu) AS avg_cpu FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2), regression AS (SELECT device_id, COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_cpu, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)), 0) AS slope, COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_cpu, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)), 0) AS intercept FROM daily_usage GROUP BY device_id) SELECT device_id AS metric, CASE WHEN slope <= 0 THEN 9999 ELSE GREATEST(0, (100 - intercept) / slope - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 86400) END AS value FROM regression r ORDER BY value ASC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Days until CPU reaches 100% saturation based on 30-day linear regression.

panels.title: Fleet Health Score

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'Fleet Score' AS metric, value FROM public.v_fleet_score

panels.description: Composite fleet health score (0-100%) from v_fleet_health view.

panels.title: Disk Usage Trend + Linear Regression Forecast

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', bucket) AS "time", device_id, AVG(avg_disk_used) AS "Disk Used (GB)" FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT time, disk_total_gb AS "Disk Total (GB)" FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND disk_total_gb > 0 ORDER BY 1

WITH daily AS (SELECT device_id, time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day, AVG(avg_disk_used) AS used FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1, 2), reg AS (SELECT device_id, COALESCE(regr_slope(used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)), 0) AS slope, COALESCE(regr_intercept(used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day)), 0) AS intercept FROM daily GROUP BY device_id) SELECT generate_series AS time, r.device_id, GREATEST(0, r.slope * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM generate_series) + r.intercept) AS "Forecast (GB)" FROM reg r, generate_series(NOW(), NOW() + INTERVAL '30 days', INTERVAL '1 day') WHERE r.slope > 0 ORDER BY 1, 2

panels.description: Hourly disk usage trend with linear regression forecast (dashed orange, 30-day projection).

panels.title: CPU Load Trend (30-Day Average)

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS "time", device_id, AVG(avg_cpu) AS "Avg CPU %" FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: 30-day daily average CPU utilization per machine. Used for long-term capacity forecasting.

panels.title: RAM Usage Trend (30-Day Average)

targets.rawSql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, ram_total_mb
  FROM public.sys_metrics
  WHERE ram_total_mb > 0
  ORDER BY device_id, time DESC
)
SELECT h.bucket AS time, h.device_id,
  ROUND((h.avg_ram_used / NULLIF(t.ram_total_mb::NUMERIC, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "Avg RAM %"
FROM public.sys_hourly h
JOIN totals t ON t.device_id = h.device_id
WHERE h.bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND h.device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
ORDER BY 1

panels.description: 30-day daily average RAM utilization per machine. Used for long-term capacity forecasting.

panels.title: CPU Z-Score Anomaly (3σ)

targets.rawSql: WITH stats AS (SELECT avg(avg_cpu) as mu, stddev(avg_cpu) as sigma FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(bucket)) SELECT bucket AS time, (avg_cpu - mu) / NULLIF(sigma, 0) AS "Z-Score" FROM public.sys_hourly, stats WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(bucket) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Fleet-wide CPU Z-Score anomaly detection using 60-minute rolling window. Red zones = ±3σ anomalies.

panels.title: Temperature Z-Score Anomaly (3σ)

targets.rawSql: WITH stats AS (SELECT avg(max_temp) as mu, stddev(max_temp) as sigma FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 AND $__timeFilter(bucket)) SELECT bucket AS time, (max_temp - mu) / NULLIF(sigma, 0) AS "Z-Score" FROM public.sys_hourly, stats WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 AND $__timeFilter(bucket) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Fleet-wide temperature Z-Score anomaly detection. Red zones indicate readings beyond ±3 standard deviations.
